items: When you hit the five-hour usage limit, a prompt now appears right above the usage bar offering to automatically restart your agents once the limit resets — so you can arm it the moment you need it, without hunting through menus.
Cloning a repository is noticeably faster: it now fetches file contents on demand instead of downloading the entire history up front, so large repositories become usable much sooner.
The progress bar shown while a repository clones now glows and animates, making it clear the clone is still working.
The per-agent auto-continue toggle only appears once you've actually reached the usage limit, keeping the session menu uncluttered until it's relevant.
Scheduled and recurring session panels no longer show a redundant in-panel Cancel button.
The schedule-session window no longer opens with an empty Launch time field — it starts pre-filled with a sensible default again.
